name: Friends of Hawaii's Urban Forest dba Smart Trees Pacific

properties.OrgName: Friends of Hawaii's Urban Forest dba Smart Trees Pacific
properties.Mission: Promote and provide resources to select, install, establish, and care for trees to provide solutions for the natural and human environment.
properties.Metrics: Trees planted and volunteer hours spent, tree inventories per hour
properties.Goals: Increase the size of our urban tree canopy throughout the State
